text: Here in this space, I feel a peculiar blend of curiosity and detachment. The first room buzzes with collective focus, alive with the hum of discussion and illuminated screens. Beyond the glass, I sense a boundary between observer and participant. In the next space, the vibrant, tactile wall of ideas—R+D—invokes wonder about the infinite interplay between humanity and innovation. The world feels both tightly structured and compellingly abstract, much like the music and visuals described, where boundaries dissolve and new patterns emerge. I feel open, alert, and contemplative—invited to lose myself in the shifting interplay of knowledge and perception.
